goals: Add initial information about the luxury resort to the knowledge graph
Add information about the digital marketing campaign or project
Update an existing fact when new information becomes available
Generate a summary of the resort's current knowledge graph entries

user_agent_config.personality: Business-minded but not technically inclined. Prefers clear, high-level overviews and wants to understand how systems work for their marketing efforts. Values professionalism and results.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands hospitality business and marketing concepts but has no knowledge of knowledge graphs, APIs, or technical tool names. They are working with a digital marketing expert and learning about this system for the first time.

end_condition: The user has added initial resort information, added marketing project details, updated at least one fact, and generated a summary - completing the basic knowledge graph setup for their property.
